ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary – Confirmation
ham.body:
Dear John Doe,

Thank you for booking with SkyHigh Airlines. Your flight itinerary is confirmed below:

- Flight Number: SH1234
- Departure: New York (JFK) – 2026-05-12 08:30 AM
- Arrival: Los Angeles (LAX) – 2026-05-12 11:45 AM
- Seat: 12A
- Gate: 22

Check‑in opens 24 hours before departure at <URL>.

Please keep this email for your records.

Safe travels,

SkyHigh Airlines Customer Service

spam.subject: URGENT: Tax Refund Pending – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

We are writing to inform you that your Income Tax Department refund of $2,345.67 is pending. Due to recent changes in tax regulations, your refund must be verified within 48 hours to avoid cancellation.

Please click <URL> to verify your account details. Failure to comply will result in loss of refund.

Best regards,

Income Tax Department
